summary: Full E2E testing of PRISM Phase 2. All 18 backend endpoints pass (20/20 pytest tests). Frontend E2E tested end-to-end via Playwright: Home hero + stats (14 stories, 120 articles, 7 publishers, 8m ago last ingest), sort/filter, subscribe (success shown), 7 source cards, Source detail with sentiment timeline + frame pie + recent articles, Story detail (neutral_summary, publisher-cards, 15 svg charts), Compare (2 columns), Search page, and Navbar navigation — all working. Real RSS+LLM data present. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Only 7 of 10 publishers ingest live data (Reuters/NPR/Bloomberg feeds returning 0 articles in this pod — noted as expected by problem statement). Consider fallback/retry or alternate feeds in code review if broader coverage is required.

/api/stats returns `sources` as an int count and the actual list as `source_list` — API shape is consistent internally but differs from the spec wording which said 'sources list'. Minor doc/spec drift only.
/api/stories/{id} nests fields under `cluster` key (with `neutral_summary`, `entities_by_type` accessible at top-level as well) — response shape works with the frontend.
seed_data_creation: None — live RSS data already ingested (14 clusters, 120 articles, 7 publishers). Subscribed test emails: test-e2e@example.com, test-frontend@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py, run via `pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py`. API response shapes use `items` key for lists (stories/search/sources), `cluster` nested key for story detail, `source_list` for stats sources array.
